headline: Super vs Siri — personal AI agents for real computer work

site_brief.goal: Create a fair but persuasive competitor comparison page for Super vs Siri. Use supplied sources for current facts, avoid fake claims, and make the practical argument that Super is better suited for repeated computer-use work because its cache can lower repeated execution cost.
site_brief.title: Super vs Siri

summary: Siri AI is a deeply integrated, privacy‑first assistant designed for Apple’s ecosystem. Super is built for people who want a personal AI agent that actually operates computers — and reuses a computer-use cache so repeated workflows get faster and cheaper over time. This page fairly explains what Siri is great at today, where its limits are, and why Super is the sharper alternative for durable computer‑use workflows.
